strategy.name: Balanced Trading Strategy
strategy.description: Conservative $5 trades based on historical probability

criteria.name: Favorite Below 75¢
criteria.description: Buy favorite (Yes contract) when priced below 75¢
criteria.rationale: Historically accurate favorites offer edge at 75¢ or lower

criteria.name: Strong Favorite Below 70¢
criteria.description: Buy favorite when priced below 70¢ (more aggressive)
criteria.rationale: Stronger edge at lower prices for well-established favorites

criteria.name: Favorite Above 85¢
criteria.description: Sell favorite (buy No) when priced above 85¢

criteria.name: Correlated Markets Arbitrage
criteria.description: Trade related markets with price discrepancies
criteria.rationale: Exploit pricing inefficiencies across related markets
